chat_messages.text: Please reference the attached file for this task. I am creating a half page script to add as an introduction to the attached script. In this scene the character Jazmine is on TikTok livestream talking to her fans. She is telling her fans about the masquerade party she is about to attend. She is super excited to have gotten the invite to this exclusive event, along with her boyfriend Ricky. However she is very adamant and disappointed about the the no cell phone policy, the no shoes policy, and that she must wear a mask at all times. She is extremely angry about the no cell phone rule. In the middle of her live stream she brings her boyfriend Ricky on to say hello and he adds on to the conversation with chill comments. Throughout the conversation Jazmine is answering random questions from her TikTok live fan comments. 1 comment is on how pretty she looks, another about her hot boy friend Ricky, another about the no shoes policy. Reference the last page of the attached pdf, where Jazmine is on TikTok to get an idea of how she addresses her audience.

chat_messages.text:
Here is a half page intro scene with Jazmine on TikTok before attending the masquerade party:

INT. JAZMINE'S BEDROOM - DAY

JAZMINE, a social media influencer, is live streaming on TikTok. She's wearing an extravagant party dress and glam makeup. 

JAZMINE
Hey JazHive! Tonight I'm going to the most exclusive masquerade party ever with bae Ricky. I'm so excited! But there's some whack rules I HAVE to tell you about. 

Jazmine rolls her eyes in annoyance. 

JAZMINE 
First of all, no phones allowed. How am I supposed to get content for you guys?! 

Jazmine scoffs and flips her hair dramatically.

JAZMINE
And we have to be barefoot. Ew! Don't they know how long I spent getting a pedicure for this?! 

RICKY, Jazmine's boyfriend, enters the frame.

RICKY
What up JazHive! Your boy's lookin' fly for this masquerade party tonight.

JAZMINE
Thanks bae! At least I'll have you to entertain me since we can't have our phones. 

RICKY 
(laughing) No doubt, it's gonna be lit!

Jazmine smiles at Ricky then turns back to the camera.

JAZMINE
Oh, and we HAVE to wear masks like the whole time! I picked out this pretty one though, matches my dress perfectly!

Jazmine holds up an ornate, feathered mask. 

JAZMINE
(reading comment) Aw thanks! I feel like a princess in this dress. 

Ricky squeezes into the frame and puts his arm around Jazmine.

JAZMINE 
Yasss @queenB, Ricky's looking hot! 

RICKY
(laughing) Thanks queen B!

JAZMINE
(reading comment) Girl, I know! Walking around barefoot is nasty! These pedis ain't cheap!

RICKY
A'ight, we gotta get going babe. Party starts soon!

JAZMINE
Bye JazHive! Wish me luck at this preppy masquerade party! Love you!

Jazmine blows a kiss at the camera. Ricky waves as they walk out of frame. Livestream ends.
Take into account they are in separate cars on the way to the masquerade party, also factor in that the party is a swingers party.

Here's an updated intro with those details:

INT. JAZMINE'S CAR - DAY

JAZMINE is driving and live streaming on TikTok. She's dressed up in a sexy party outfit. 

JAZMINE  
Hey JazHive! Your girl's on the way to a masquerade party tonight. This one's a little different though...it's a swingers party! 

Jazmine raises her eyebrows suggestively.

JAZMINE
I'm going solo since bae Ricky's meeting me there. The rules are cray cray though! 

Jazmine rolls her eyes. 

JAZMINE
No phones allowed! How am I supposed to give you guys the tea?! 

Jazmine looks annoyed.

JAZMINE  
And we gotta be barefoot the whole time. I just got a bomb pedicure! These feet are too pretty to be stepping all over someone else's nasty floors.

Jazmine wiggles her feet, showing off her pedicured toes.

JAZMINE
(reading comments)
Aw thanks! This outfit is sexy right? Wait til you see my mask, it's gorgeous! 

Jazmine holds up a feathered, ornate mask.

JAZMINE
I know, no shoes is gross! But I gotta follow the rules if I wanna get into this exclusive party and give you guys the behind the scenes. Wish me luck JazHive! Imma get some wild content for you guys tonight! Stay tuned!

Jazmine blows a kiss to the camera as the TikTok livestream ends.

Sorry Claude , I should have mentioned that Ricky is still in the conversation, but he is streaming from his on TikTok account on to her live stream. You do not need to mention anything about the car other than the fact that they are both on the way.

Got it, here's an updated version with Ricky joining the livestream from his own account:

JAZMINE is live streaming on TikTok, dressed up for the masquerade party. 

JAZMINE
JazHive! Your girl's getting ready for a masquerade party tonight. But there's some cray rules I gotta tell you about!

Jazmine rolls her eyes in annoyance.

JAZMINE

JAZMINE
(reading comments)
I know, no shoes is nasty! But we gotta follow the rules to get into this exclusive party. Wish us luck JazHive! Stay tuned for more tea later!

Jazmine blows a kiss at the camera. Ricky waves as they both end their livestreams.

Ok its sounding pretty good, can we add more infuses on how annoyed she is at the no cell phone rule

You got it! Here's an updated version with more emphasis on Jazmine's annoyance about the no cell phone rule:

INT. JAZMINE'S CAR - DAY

JAZMINE is driving, looking glam for the masquerade party tonight. She's live streaming on TikTok.

JAZMINE
JazHive! Your girl's headed to an exclusive masquerade party tonight, but they have some stupid rules I NEED to vent about! 

Jazmine huffs in exaggerated annoyance.

JAZMINE 
The biggest issue is no cell phones allowed at this party! Are you kidding me?? I'm supposed to just not post or go live at all? Unacceptable! 

Jazmine shakes her head in disgust. 

JAZMINE  
How am I supposed to get good content for you guys without my phone? This is an outrage!

Jazmine tugs at her hair in frustration. 

JAZMINE
As an influencer, my phone is my lifeline! How am I supposed to survive a party with no posts, no IG stories, no TikToks? 

Jazmine looks at the camera pleadingly. 

JAZMINE  
I NEED my phone to breathe, JazHive! Help me! This party better be worth it or I swear...

Jazmine shakes her head angrily and sighs.  

JAZMINE  
Anyways, wish me luck JazHive. I'm bout to sneak my phone in somehow. Stay tuned!

Jazmine blows a kiss and signs off.

You got it! Here's a full page version: 

INT. JAZMINE'S CAR - DAY

JAZMINE is driving to the masquerade party, looking glam in a sexy outfit. She's live streaming on TikTok.

JAZMINE
JazHive! Your girl's headed to an exclusive masquerade party tonight, but they have some whack rules I gotta complain about. 

Jazmine rolls her eyes dramatically.

JAZMINE  
The biggest issue is no cell phones allowed! Can you believe that?? I'm supposed to just not post or go live at all? So lame!

Jazmine scoffs and shakes her head. 

JAZMINE
Like how am I supposed to get good content for you guys without my phone? Totally ridiculous. This party better be worth it!

INT. RICKY'S CAR - DAY

RICKY is also driving solo, joining Jazmine's livestream.

RICKY
Yo JazHive! Ya boy Ricky here, on the way to this masquerade party too. Y'all hear this crazy no phone rule? Got my girl Jazmine heated!

INT. JAZMINE'S CAR - DAY

JAZMINE 
Thanks bae! Can you believe this no phone BS? I'm losing it over here! 

Jazmine tugs at her hair dramatically.

JAZMINE
As an influencer, my phone is everything! How am I supposed to survive a party with no posts, no IG stories, no TikToks?

Jazmine stares pleadingly into the camera.

JAZMINE
I NEED my phone to breathe, JazHive! Don't let them take my baby away from me!

Jazmine pretends to cry hysterically. 

JAZMINE  
(reading comments)
Awww thanks JazHivers! Yes this outfit is fierce! Wait till you see the mask I picked out, it's gorgeous.

Jazmine holds up an ornate, feathery masquerade mask.

JAZMINE
Oooh good question! Let me show you guys the shoes I was gonna wear before I found out about this whack no shoes rule!

Jazmine pans camera down to show off a pair of strappy, glamorous heels.

JAZMINE  
I know, walking around barefoot is nasty! And these shoes would've looked so cute with my outfit! But rules are rules I guess.

Jazmine sighs dejectedly. 

JAZMINE  
Wish me luck sneaking in my phone somehow! And getting through this party barefoot. Love you JazHive! Stay tuned!

Jazmine blows an exaggerated kiss and signs off.
Can you craft an event flyer for the masquerade party hosted by Damon and Desiree, make sure to include the rules mentioned from the initial prompt, you can also reference the attached pdf

Here is an event flyer for Damon and Desiree's masquerade party including the mentioned rules:

You're Invited to an Evening of Mystery and Intrigue!

Damon and Desiree's Exclusive Masquerade Party

When: Saturday, October 15th, 8pm
Where: 4681 Hillcrest Lane

Attire: formal masquerade wear required. Masks mandatory.

House Rules:
- No cell phones or photo/video recording permitted
- All guests must remain barefoot for the duration of the event
- Masks must be worn at all times while on the premises
- No real names - use aliases only
- Obey your hosts at all times 

Join us for an unforgettable evening of food, drink, and entertainment. Indulge your senses and surrender to the allure of the masquerade...

RSVP to 123-456-7890 by October 10th. Party access information will be provided to confirmed guests. We eagerly await your presence! 

Sincerely,
Your Hosts
Damon and Desiree
